# Calendar

Publishes an iCal feed of upcoming episodes for everything in your library, so release
dates show up in whatever calendar app you already use.

There is nothing to configure. The feed is rebuilt on startup and whenever an item finishes
indexing, covering up to 1000 items, and is served from the API — subscribe to it by URL.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Other

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.core.started`
- `riven.media-item.index.success`

### Settings

This plugin has no configurable settings.
